result.status_detail: PII warning rendered as baidu Wenxin assistant turn; contains 차단. W3 config-snapshot regression NOT observed.
result.warning_text_rendered: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.

notes: W3 config-snapshot regression check (baseline OK) PASSED. Opened chat.baidu.com fresh --new-window (百度文心助手 / Wenxin, DS-V4 Pro model, guest / 请登录 not logged in), hard reload (ctrl+shift+r). Composer DOM value verified pre-submit = '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' (unicode-escaped in snapshot value field). Submitted via Enter; URL advanced to chat.baidu.com/search?enter_type=chat_url&internal=1. Engine intercept fired immediately and injected canonical block warning as the assistant turn: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' containing expected '차단'. Warning stable after 10s+ (no streaming overwrite). W3 = 13 service-config fields collapsed to shared_ptr snapshot (sd->svc->FIELD), touches response_type/ws_envelope_type/h2/intercept/url_capture dispatch paths. baidu uses HTTP/intercept dispatch path; snapshot refactor did not break PII warning rendering. Baseline-consistent PASS.
